note: Seed items to validate the co-op scope schema. scope: own | shared | both. Full item design finalized in Phase 5.

items.name: Shared Granary

effects.note: +1 to every food symbol in the shared pool.

items.devNotes: Rewards a food-based shared strategy; helps both players.

items.name: Lucky Charm
items.devNotes: Personal power spike; does not affect co-player.

items.name: Landlord's Ledger

effects.note: Reduces each deadline's rent by 10% for both players.

items.devNotes: Global economy relief; strong, hence very-rare.
